subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Desired One, Who through His all-conquering Will and consummate Wisdom hath marshaled the ranks of the Bayan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بارادهٴ غالبه و حکمت بالغه صفوف بیانرا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
